name: No-Bake Fruitcake
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Graham crackers, rolled and fine
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except whipping cream and graham crackers in a large mixing bowl. Stir together well.
2. Whip the cream until it holds soft peaks.
3. Add the fruit mixture to the whipped cream.
4. Gradually fold in the crumbs, using your hands to mix them thoroughly.
5. Place the mixture into a graham cracker box lined with foil.
6. Chill in the refrigerator until ready to serve.
